'''''Invincible''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was one of four ships that formed the core forces of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Aris Sector task force|anti-piracy task force]].<ref name="DauntlessSWE" />

{{Ship-stub}}
